item.name: Fetch Patient Profile (get real patientId from DB)

request.description: Gọi ngay sau Login Patient để lấy patientId thực từ DB.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('patientId', j.id); console.log('✅ patientId set from DB:', j.id); }
console.error('❌ Cannot fetch patient profile:', pm.response.text());

item.name: Fetch Doctor Profile (get real doctorId from DB)

request.description: Gọi ngay sau Login Doctor để lấy doctorId thực từ DB.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('doctorId', j.id); console.log('✅ doctorId set from DB:', j.id); }

// Data-Driven Login: clear auth_token to prevent collection-level script

// Only process token on successful login

pm.test('Body contains status', () => { const b = pm.response.text(); pm.expect(b.length).to.be.above(0); });

item.name: POST Feedback - Rating Out Of Range

exec: const apt=(pm.response.json().appointment||pm.response.json()); pm.environment.set('appointmentId', apt.id); if(apt.patientId) pm.environment.set('patientId', apt.patientId);

item.name: 23_Debug_Test
item.description: Local debug only - no auth required

item.name: 99_Teardown
item.description: Chạy sau tất cả các test. Nếu có test fail, tự động tạo Jira Task.

request.description: Dummy request: Jira reporting logic runs in the pre-request script. Hits health endpoint so it always returns 200 and does not pollute test results.

exec: // JIRA AUTO-REPORTER: Runs before the teardown request
// Creates a Jira Task when any failures were recorded during the run
console.warn('⚠️ Jira credentials incomplete. Set jira_email & jira_api_token in Environment.');
console.log('✅ All tests passed! No Jira task needed.');
console.log(`❌ ${failures.length} test(s) failed. Creating Jira Task...`);
const summary = `[Postman] ${failures.length} API test(s) failed — ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')}`;
content: [{ type: 'text', text: '🔴 Postman API Test Failure Report' }]
// ── Transition: TO DO → TESTING → BUG FOUND ──────────
if (tErr) { console.warn('⚠️ Could not fetch transitions:', tErr); return; }
console.warn('⚠️ Start Work transition not found. Task left in TO DO.');
if (sErr) { console.warn('⚠️ Transition Start Work failed:', sErr); return; }
// Step 2: Get transitions again (now in TESTING state)
if (t2Err) { console.warn('⚠️ Could not fetch transitions (step 2)'); return; }
console.warn('⚠️ Bug Found transition not found. Task left in TESTING.');
if (bErr) { console.warn('⚠️ Bug Found transition failed:', bErr); return; }
console.log(`   🐛 ${body.key} is now BUG FOUND on the board.`);
console.error('❌ Failed to create Jira task:', JSON.stringify(body));
// Teardown request — just verify health endpoint is alive
console.log(`📋 Jira Task created this run: ${jiraTask}`);
console.log('✅ No failures reported to Jira this run.');
